title: Minecraft Faithfully Remastered
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35f08e22a262b06e51590615ced46536e39b7173.png)**Minecraft is now 14 years old. While it has one of the greatest gameplay and art style in the gaming world, the technical aspects have gotten pretty outdated.** 

**This modpack aims at preserving the gameplay and art style of the game completely while improving the graphics, sounds and UI. It also contains mods that enable you to make more advantage of modern hardware.**

**The pack is designed for Single-Player or Coop with friends in Survival mode.**

If you are interested in a more Vanilla+-like experience check out the [Dungeons Edition](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mcfr-dungeons-edition) of this pack!

---

## Features:

- **Readds Mob Vote Losers**

- **Adds new biomes and remasteres Vanilla biomes**
- **Adds new structures and remasteres Vanilla structures**

- **Improved Rendering**
- **Improved Performance**

- **Improved Sounds**

- **Improved Entity/Player Models**
- **Improved Entity/Player Animations**
- **Mob Texture Variants**

- **Improved Leaves and Plants**
- **Improved Block Models**
- **Block Variants** 
  
- **Improved Items** 
- **Improved Particles** 

- **Improved Menus, HUD, Tooltips and Containers**

- **Full Controller Support**
- **Improved Multiplayer Experience**

---

<details>
<summary>Optimization</summary>

**Set your Memory to at least 2048MB**
  - _In instance settings -> Java and Memory -> Custom memory allocation -> **2048MB**_

**Disable these mods for better performance:**

- **Iris** Mod; this disables shaders
- **Shaders** can be substituted by enabeling **Sodium Core Shader Support** and **re-Shade**. This enables enhanced Shading without any FPS loss.
- **SubtleEffects** Mod; this disables the extra particle effects

</details>

This pack is NOT associated with Mojang, Minecraft or Minecraft Dungeons and does NOT represent those brands!
